metadata.title: Contact - No PowerPoint, no empty promises | Federico Calicchia
metadata.description: Freelance Web Designer & Developer based in Italy. Drop a line or book a free 30-minute call. No PowerPoint, no empty promises, no agency middlemen.
metadata.ogTitle: Contact - No PowerPoint, no empty promises
metadata.ogDescription: Free 30-minute consultation. No commitment, no pitch deck.

hero.title: Contact. No PowerPoint, no empty promises.
hero.lead:
A 30-minute call to see if it makes sense to work together.
Freelance Web Designer & Developer — websites, e-commerce, development, SEO, WordPress.
Reply within 24 hours. No commitment, no PowerPoint pitches.

page.intro: A 30-minute call to see if it makes sense to work together. Freelance Web Designer & Developer based in Ceccano (FR) — websites, e-commerce, development, SEO, WordPress. Reply within 24 hours. No commitment, no PowerPoint pitches.
